utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喂。德州遊騎兵上次比賽係幾時呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 六月四號星期日。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。佢哋上次同邊隊打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太空人隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 賽果係點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 七比二。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。遊騎兵隊到目前為止嘅勝負紀錄係點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 廿六勝卅一負。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋星期四會同邊隊打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋星期四冇賽程。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁星期五呢？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋星期五有比賽。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢想知呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，祝你有個愉快嘅一日，再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒，再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，英格蘭超級聯賽嘅般尼茅夫足球會成績點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 般尼茅夫足球會排第十七位，三勝七負一和。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋到目前為止打咗幾多場比賽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 到目前為止佢哋打咗十一場比賽。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋上次同邊隊打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋上次係十一月四號同紐卡素打，般尼茅夫以一比零贏咗。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。佢哋嘅龍門係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Artur Boruc 係佢哋其中一個龍門。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，助理。蒙特利爾衝擊隊排第幾位呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，用戶。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋上個星期六同邊隊打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋上個星期六同奧蘭多城打，以二比一贏咗。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋上次比賽表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 嗰場就係佢哋上次嘅比賽。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋嘅龍門係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Evan Bush 係佢哋嘅龍門。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒，祝你週末愉快。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想知紐卡素聯隊嘅紀錄。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋目前嘅紀錄係三勝零和三負。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋到目前為止打咗幾多場比賽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 總共六場比賽。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋上次同邊隊打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 上次比賽係同白禮頓足球會打。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋上次比賽表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋輸咗嗰場波，比數係一比零。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋個經理係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋個經理係拉斐爾·賓尼迪斯。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。完美。我淨係想知呢啲咋。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。明尼蘇達雙城隊今季表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 明尼蘇達雙城隊今季表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 明尼蘇達雙城隊以三十二勝三十七負排第三位。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。明尼蘇達雙城隊今日有冇比賽呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 明尼蘇達雙城隊今日有冇比賽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，佢哋今日會喺Target Field球場對波士頓紅襪隊。呢場比賽會喺下晝五點十分開始。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋下個星期日會對邊隊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 下個星期日，七月一號，佢哋會對芝加哥小熊隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋上場波打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋尋日對波士頓紅襪隊，雙城隊以六比二贏咗。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋隊波嘅接球手係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 積遜·卡斯特羅、米奇·加弗同埋鮑比·威爾遜都係明尼蘇達雙城隊嘅接球手。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋隊波嘅投手係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 荷西·貝里奧斯、厄文·桑塔納、凱爾·吉布森、蘭斯·林恩、費爾南多·羅梅羅都係隊波嘅投手。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 關於呢隊波仲有冇其他嘢我需要知㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我唔肯定。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒。今日就係咁多啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 洛杉磯銀河隊而家嘅戰績係點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 洛杉磯銀河隊有六勝、四和、八負。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋今日有冇比賽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇呀。佢哋下一場比賽係七月十五號星期六晚七點，對曼聯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋以三比二輸咗畀聖荷西地震隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 西岸聯盟而家邊隊排第一呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 堪薩斯城體育會以八勝、八和、四負排西岸聯盟第一位。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。好多謝你。我淨係想知呢啲咋。你真係最好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 明尼蘇達雙城隊排第幾位呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第二位。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 雙城隊而家有冇比賽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好，咁雙城隊下個星期日會對邊隊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 小熊隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 雙城隊上場波打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你介唔介意重複一次呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 雙城隊上場波打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋以二比一贏咗。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 美國聯盟西區邊隊排最尾呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 遊騎兵隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。真係好多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜。下次再傾。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，哥倫布機員南卡羅來納州隊排第幾位呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 哥倫布隊目前喺東岸聯賽排第六位。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋今季到而家輸咗幾多場呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 輸咗十場。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋而家有冇比賽緊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇呀，佢哋而家冇比賽緊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋七月一號同邊隊打過呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 七月一號，佢哋對亞特蘭大聯隊，輸咗零比二。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋上場比賽打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋上場比賽係七月四號對明尼蘇達聯隊，贏咗一比零。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 東岸聯賽邊隊排第一呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 芝加哥隊喺東岸聯賽排第一。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，唔該晒你。就係咁多啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。曼聯排第幾位呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 具體嚟講，佢哋嘅戰績係點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋排第二位，踢咗二十四場波，贏咗十六場。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你話踢咗幾多場呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 二十四場。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。咁佢哋下一場會同邊隊打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋聽日中午十二點會對熱刺。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。咁佢哋上場比賽打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋喺一月二十六號對葉士域治鎮，贏咗四比零。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，咁佢哋嘅前鋒係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等一陣。仲搵緊。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 盧卡古。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，你今日點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我好好，唔該晒你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我係NBA底特律活塞隊嘅忠實球迷。佢哋今年打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 底特律活塞隊排第八位，兩勝兩負。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋喺邊個聯賽呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋喺東岸聯賽。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋上場比賽打成點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋上場比賽係尋日對費城七十六人隊，底特律活塞隊以九十七比八十六輸咗。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁有趣。佢哋嘅正選控球後衛係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 雷吉·傑克遜係佢哋嘅正選控球後衛。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我記得。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你喺度嗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋隊今年邊個嘅人工最高呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 對唔住，我暫時冇呢個資料。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔使擔心，多謝你嘅時間。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 助手你好，我開始對英格蘭超級聯賽有興趣，我想了解多啲利物浦嗰隊波，利物浦足球會。佢哋最近有冇買賣球員呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓。等一陣啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好，我等。佢哋個球場叫咩名？喺邊個城市㗎？其實我估都係利物浦嘅，不過都問吓啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋個球場叫咩名？喺邊個城市㗎？其實我估都係利物浦嘅，不過都問吓啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 晏菲路係個球場嘅名，佢喺英國利物浦。曼聯同愛華頓係利物浦最大嘅宿敵。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 幾有趣喎。利物浦今年入到季後賽嘅機會大唔大呀？佢哋表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 利物浦排第三，有54分，咁樣佢哋入到季後賽嘅機會都幾大㗎。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哦，佢哋表現都幾好喎。利物浦加油，打敗曼聯！我好憎曼聯㗎。曼城都踢得幾好㗎。仲有最後一條問題。利物浦嘅領隊係邊個呀？佢喺呢隊波幾耐㗎啦？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 高普係利物浦嘅領隊，佢由2015年開始就喺度啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒你呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。下次再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 下次再見啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 達拉斯獨行俠排第幾呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 達拉斯獨行俠喺西岸排最尾，兩勝十二負。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋喺邊個聯盟㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋喺西岸聯盟。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋上次幾時打波呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋上次打波係11月12號對雷霆，獨行俠以112比99輸咗場波。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋嘅正選小前鋒係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 夏里遜巴恩斯係佢哋嘅正選小前鋒。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋下一場對邊隊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋下一場波會喺今日下晝5點半對聖安東尼奧馬刺。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦，我淨係想知咁多咋。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想知多啲聖路易紅雀嘅資料。佢哋今年表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋排第三。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋今日有冇波打呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋下個星期日對邊隊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 勇士隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋上次幾時打波呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 尋日。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁國家聯盟西岸排第一係邊隊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 響尾蛇隊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，好好，我淨係想知咁多咋。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想問啲關於英格蘭超級聯賽足球嘅問題呀，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。你想知啲咩呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 韋斯咸聯隊表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 韋斯咸聯隊目前喺英超排最尾，零勝一負。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。咁佢哋下一場對邊隊呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋下一場會喺朝早7點對修咸頓。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁佢哋上次打波表現點樣呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 佢哋上次輸咗畀聯隊4比0。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔係好近。咁最後，佢哋嘅龍門係邊個呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祖赫特同阿祖安係佢哋嘅龍門。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。真係好多謝你幫手。祝你今日過得開心。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔該。
